meta.title: Apple Immersive Video & Spatial Computing — Content Catalog

apple_tv.label: Apple TV App
apple_tv.note: Pre-installed on Apple Vision Pro. All content free or with Apple TV+.

entries.title: Elevated
entries.note: Apple's flagship AIV travel series, 4 episodes.

entries.title: Adventure
entries.note: Adventure sports series, 5 episodes, 2024–2025.

entries.title: Boundless
entries.note: Adventure series, 2024–2025.

entries.title: Wild Life
entries.note: Adventure/nature series, 4 episodes, 2024–2025.

entries.title: Flight Ready
entries.note: F-18 fighter pilots aboard the USS Nimitz.

entries.title: Prehistoric Planet Immersive
entries.note: Documentary series, 2 episodes, 2024.

entries.title: Top Dogs
entries.note: AIV documentary series, 2 episodes. Crufts dog show.

entries.title: World of Red Bull
entries.note: Sports series.

entries.title: Real Madrid: The Weight of Greatness
entries.note: Free on Apple TV. Shot over 5 days during the 2025 Champions League with 30+ URSA Cine Immersive cameras. Features Mbappé, Bellingham, Vinícius Jr., Courtois.

entries.title: MotoGP: Tour De Force
entries.note: Johann Zarco's dramatic French MotoGP Grand Prix victory at Le Mans.

entries.title: VIP
entries.note: Behind-the-scenes at iconic sports venues.

entries.title: Man vs. Beast
entries.note: Professional bull riding — inside the rodeo.

entries.title: 2023 MLS Cup Highlights
entries.note: Columbus Crew's push for their third MLS crown.

entries.title: 2024 NBA All-Star Weekend
entries.note: Gravity-defying icons at NBA's star-packed weekend.

entries.title: NBA Lakers Games (6 games)
entries.note: Six Lakers games via Spectrum Front Row, Jan–Mar 2026. Links in Apple TV app.

entries.title: Metallica
entries.note: First-of-its-kind immersive concert.

entries.title: BBC Proms — Debut at the BBC Proms
entries.note: Lukas Sternath + BBC Symphony Orchestra at Royal Albert Hall. Shot by Livewire Pictures on URSA Cine Immersive.

entries.title: Alicia Keys: Rehearsal Room
entries.note: Intimate rehearsal featuring 'No One,' 'If I Ain't Got You,' and 'You Don't Know My Name'.

entries.title: NEAREST CORTIS
entries.note: CORTIS backstage rehearsal room. BIGHIT/HYBE boy band, track 'GO!'.

entries.title: Concert For One
entries.note: Exclusive private performances.

entries.title: The Weeknd: Open Hearts
entries.note: Music video. The Weeknd navigates a surreal, haunting cityscape.

entries.title: Bono: Stories of Surrender
entries.note: First feature-length AIV film. Directed by Elad Offer.

entries.title: Submerged
entries.note: WWII submarine crew under torpedo attack. Directed by Edward Berger (All Quiet on the Western Front).

entries.title: Experience Immersive
entries.note: Preview/sampler. Clips from Metallica, Yankees, and Submerged.

entries.title: Julaymba
entries.note: Award-winning documentary by PHORIA. Daintree Rainforest, Australia. Scheduled Oct 2025 — still unreleased as of May 2026. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive.

entries.title: Experience Paris
entries.note: By The Explorers. Three-Michelin-star kitchen, Eiffel Tower, Montmartre. Fall 2025 — still unreleased.

entries.title: CNN — Journey to Antarctica
entries.note: Emperor penguins on Snow Hill Island with CNN's Bill Weir. Spring 2026 — may still be unreleased.

entries.title: Audi F1 Project
entries.note: Mentioned in Apple Newsroom Sep 2025 — no details yet.

entries.title: 4 Minutes Inside Super Bowl LVIII
entries.note: Chiefs vs. 49ers. Was available Sep 2024.

entries.title: F1 The Movie: Hot Lap Immersive
entries.note: High-speed test drive with Brad Pitt. Was available Jun 2025.

theater_app.label: Theater App
theater_app.note: Tap any title to open directly in the Theater app — deep links require Theater to be installed.

entries.title: The Fine Dining Bakery
entries.note: Clara Chong dir, Ben Allan prod. About Christopher Thé and the world's most Instagrammed cake.

entries.title: The Dobos Connection
entries.note: Clara Chong dir, Ben Allan & Mike Seymour PhD prod. Romantic drama set over one evening at a university.

entries.title: Jenna Paints Vidiots
entries.note: Sign painter Jenna Homen at the IRL Eagle Theater and Vidiots video store.

entries.title: Robot.com
entries.note: First-ever brand commercial in Apple Immersive Video. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive.

entries.title: Urban Theory Teaser
entries.note: Italian dance crew Urban Theory collaboration.

entries.title: Seeing Things: Sensorama
entries.note: Part one of a three-part VR history. In association with the Immersive Archive at USC.

entries.title: Yo-yo Technique
entries.note: First-of-its-kind documentary on the Spirit Yo team and the art of yo-yo.

entries.title: WAI-000
entries.note: VJ WOOO & Emmy-winning Gryun Kim. Spatial sound by Echoic Audio. 'If AI is fed from human memories, what happens when it grows nostalgic?'

entries.title: Nebula Junkyard
entries.note: SUPER POP Festival collaboration between VJ WOOO and K-Pop producer TOYO.

entries.title: We Make Belonging
entries.note: Color artist Morag Myerscough transforms Munich's Flux Museum. Dir: Carl Amadeus Hiller & Isabelle Vlahos.

entries.title: Resonance
entries.note: Master luthier Niklaus Weber crafts a violin. Dir: Carl Amadeus Hiller & Sheila Uschkurat.

entries.title: KICK
entries.note: Elite freeriders build the ultimate jump in the French Alps. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive.

entries.title: Echoes of the Middle East
entries.note: UAE and Oman travelogue. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive.

entries.title: Kids Elite Live
entries.note: Kids Elite dancers in Paris. From upcoming doc 'Sabrina Lonis, From Kids to Elite Dancers.' By Immersive Flashback. Not yet released.

spatial_film.label: Spatial Film
spatial_film.note: Streaming library of 180° and 360° spatial films on Vision Pro. Content by Keeley Turner, Hugh Hou, and SliceoflifeVR.

entries.title: Multnomah Falls
entries.note: Native AIV, 90fps HDR. Shot by Hugh Hou on URSA Cine Immersive.

entries.title: Lord Leycester Hospital: 900 Years of History
entries.note: Dir: Keeley Turner. Shot by Hugh Hou. Auggie Award finalist. A medieval almshouse tied to Robert Dudley and Queen Elizabeth I — retired soldiers still live here today.

entries.title: Immersive NYC | Floating Island & The High Line
entries.note: Dir: Keeley Turner. Shot by Hugh Hou on URSA Cine Immersive. 16K captured, supersampled to 8K per eye 3D HDR. Hudson River floating park to The High Line and Vessel at night.

entries.title: Yosemite: El Capitan Summit
entries.note: 16K VR180. Shot on Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive. 28-hour journey to El Capitan summit. Monthly releases planned — Times Square and Central Park upcoming.

entries.title: altitude.101 — KICK
entries.note: Also on Theater app.

entries.title: altitude.101 — Echoes of the Middle East
entries.note: Also on Theater app.

entries.title: Prima Immersive
entries.note: Native 16K/90fps/HDR distribution. Content: The Spatialists: Sessions. New content in production.

entries.title: FrontRow
entries.note: Spatial video concerts, comedy specials, and white label brand experiences.

entries.title: Blue Frog Immersive
entries.note: Immersive 3D concert performances with spatial audio.

entries.title: AmazeVR
entries.note: VR concerts bringing fans face-to-face with artists.

entries.title: Acute Immersive
entries.note: AIV content platform.

entries.title: Spatial Film
entries.note: Streaming library of 180° and 360° spatial films. Bi-weekly new titles. Vision Pro exclusive. Known titles include Multnomah Falls by Hugh Hou (native AIV, 90fps HDR).

entries.title: YouTube for visionOS
entries.note: Supports 3D 360°, VR180, standard video. 8K on M5 Vision Pro.

entries.title: Explore POV
entries.note: 2025 Apple Vision Pro App of the Year. Immersive content library.

entries.title: ARLUMA360
entries.note: VR180 immersive content player. First release: Finland Icescapes Pt. 1 (May 2026).

entries.title: Immersa — Spatial Cinema
entries.note: Professional delivery platform for immersive filmmakers and studios.

entries.title: JustVR
entries.note: Cross-platform immersive video app (Vision Pro, Meta Quest, Pico). Creator-built library.

entries.title: Immersive America — Waterfalls
entries.note: California & Kauai waterfalls. 8K on YouTube VR. 8K on M5 Vision Pro, 4K on M2.

entries.title: Immersive America — American Southwest
entries.note: Grand Canyon, Bryce Canyon, Monument Valley, Zion, Las Vegas. WebXR + APMP format.

entries.title: Blueplanet VR Explore
entries.note: 100+ photogrammetric spatial experiences via WebXR.

entries.title: Yosemite in Snow
entries.note: Community creator. Canon R5C + Qoocam3 VR180. Also on YouTube and DeoVR.

entries.title: Bastille Day France — Immersive Flashback
entries.note: President Macron as narrator. 8 min. May be geo-locked to France. Available at Maison Élysée on Vision Pro.

entries.title: Twin Peaks in 180VR
entries.note: VR180, May 2026. By Brendan Parker. Real Twin Peaks locations in Washington State.

entries.title: Cartagena, Colombia in 8K VR180
entries.note: By u/BeyondVRMedia, May 2026. Walled City, San Felipe Fortress, colonial streets, flamingos.

entries.title: Mulan 2125
entries.note: VR epic, Venice Immersive Competition 2025. Film-grade CG. Chinese developer — verify English accessibility.

entries.title: Caradise
entries.note: Explore iconic car designs in spatial computing. Vision Pro exclusive. Solo developer: Peder Sandqvist. Apple Design Awards 2026 finalist.

entries.title: What If…? An Immersive Story
entries.note: Disney+ Original interactive experience. Marvel Studios' What If…? universe. Not AIV — interactive immersive experience.

entries.title: Blueplanet VR
entries.note: 100+ photogrammetric spatial experiences of UNESCO World Heritage Sites. By Eric Hanson, USC faculty.

entries.title: Balenciaga — Summer 26 Show
entries.note: Pier Paolo Piccioli's debut Balenciaga collection. Available in Balenciaga's own Vision Pro app. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive.

creators.note: Tools, hardware, cameras, learning resources, and spatial audio — for immersive content producers.

entries.title: Apple Immersive Video Utility (AIVU)
entries.note: Import media, create .aivu files, prepare AIV content for playback or distribution.

entries.title: Colorfront Immersive Utility
entries.note: Professional Mac app (Apple Silicon M1+, macOS 26+). GPU-accelerated .aivu creation from ProRes or MV-HEVC. Free tier available; MV-HEVC License $299/year.

entries.title: AIME Generator
entries.note: Creates AIV lens profile files (.aime) for virtually any VR180 camera. Mac only. Democratizes AIV creation beyond the URSA.

entries.title: MainConcept MV-HEVC Encoder SDK
entries.note: Codec SDK 16.2. DaVinci Resolve Studio + Colorfront integration. April 14, 2026.

entries.title: Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive 100G
entries.note: World's first live production AIV camera. Dual 8K×8K RGBW sensors, 100G Ethernet, 16 stops DR. NAB 2026.

entries.title: Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive Camera Manual
entries.note: Full guide covering camera operation and DaVinci Resolve AIV workflows. PDF.

entries.title: Wooden Camera — URSA Cine Immersive Accessories
entries.note: Redesigned Top Plate, Side Rails, Riser Plate, D-Box Gold Mount Plus power system.

entries.title: Gates Immersive Housing
entries.note: Underwater housing for URSA Cine Immersive. Developed with Apple and Blackmagic Design. 12-inch AR-coated glass dome port. Depth-rated. Available for sale and hire.

entries.title: ACHTEL 3Deep Immersive Camera
entries.note: Underwater housing using dual submersible lenses — eliminates dome port. For ACHTEL 9×7 camera. Depth-rated to 60m. Titanium, ~20kg.

entries.title: Logitech MUSE Stylus for Vision Pro
entries.note: Precision stylus for Vision Pro.

entries.title: PlayStation VR2 Sense Controller & Charging Station
entries.note: Traditional gaming controller support for Vision Pro. Available on Apple Store.

entries.title: Meet Apple Spatial Audio Format and APAC
entries.note: Official Apple session introducing ASAF and the Apple Positional Audio Codec (APAC).

entries.title: fxguide — Believable and Immersive Audio
entries.note: By Mike Seymour. FMX spatial audio recording + ASAF deep dive for AIV. Includes downloadable ASAF example file.

entries.title: Cinematic Immersive for Professionals
entries.note: By Ben Allan & Clara Chong. First comprehensive guide to AIV creative and technical workflow. Apple Books.

entries.title: Creator Week Educational Series
entries.note: Overview of all media types for visionOS apps, games, and experiences.

entries.title: Team2Films Immersive Master Class
entries.note: What it takes to create an AIV documentary.

entries.title: Hugh Hou AIV Master Class
entries.note: Complete URSA Cine Immersive to Apple Vision Pro workflow in DaVinci Resolve.

entries.title: AIV Community YouTube Playlist
entries.note: Community-curated collection of AIV production videos.

entries.title: Learn About Apple Immersive Video Technologies (WWDC25)
entries.note: AIV format, ImmersiveMediaSupport framework, encoding, and HLS streaming.

entries.title: Explore Video Experiences for visionOS (WWDC25)
entries.note: Profiles for 180°, 360°, Wide FOV, AIV, 2D, 3D, and spatial video.

entries.title: What is Apple Immersive Video? — Acute Immersive
entries.note: Clear, accessible explainer on the format, hardware, and what makes it different.

entries.title: ImmersiveMediaSupport Framework
entries.note: Apple developer documentation for immersive media technologies.

entries.title: GB Railfreight + JigSpace — Spatial Training
entries.note: One of the UK's first freight operators to use spatial computing for immersive remote training.

entries.title: University of Michigan — VR for MS Depression
entries.note: Professor earns national recognition for using VR to bring nature experiences to MS patients with limited mobility.

entries.title: Brain Games Studio — Rodney ALS + BCI + XR
entries.note: Thought-controlled BCI technology combined with XR for a person with ALS.

entries.title: The Mandalorian Director Uses Vision Pro to Preview IMAX
entries.note: Jon Favreau used a custom Vision Pro app to preview the full IMAX scope during filming.

entries.title: NASA Artemis II — Filmed in Immersive Video
entries.note: Artemis II launch captured in Apple Immersive Video. Content not yet released as of May 2026.

entries.title: Met Museum — HD 3D Scans of Art Objects
entries.note: Metropolitan Museum of Art releases high-detail 3D models of art objects.

entries.title: Immersive for Autodesk VRED
entries.note: Stream Autodesk VRED from on-premises RTX workstations to Vision Pro. Four-way collaboration: Autodesk, Apple, NVIDIA, Innoactive. Up to 2 participants.

entries.title: See The Bravo
entries.note: Aviation airspace 3D visualization for pilot training. Students see shelves, altitudes, and procedures in 3D space instead of flat charts.

entries.title: Full Sail University — Spatial Computing Innovation Lab
entries.note: First higher education institution in the US with URSA Cine Immersive. 50 Apple Vision Pro devices. Winter Park, FL.

entries.title: Purdue PVM Pro Tips for Animal Health
entries.note: Vision Pro exclusive from Purdue College of Veterinary Medicine. Step-by-step at-home pet care tutorials created by Purdue vets.

entries.title: Intune Userless ADE for visionOS
entries.note: Vision Pro can be enrolled and managed through Apple Business Manager via Microsoft Intune.

entries.title: iRacing Connect
entries.note: World's most popular online racing simulator on Vision Pro. visionOS 26.4 foveated streaming + Nvidia CloudXR.

entries.title: SpatialGen Zeus — Live AIV Streaming Hardware
entries.note: Dedicated hardware for live AIV streaming — 16K at 90 FPS. Announced via Justin Ryan/Spatial Insider. No official press release yet.

entries.title: Steam Link
entries.note: Native Vision Pro app. Stream your full Steam library wirelessly from a PC.

entries.title: Apple Immersive & Spatial Computing — Curated Reddit Feed
entries.note: Curated multireddit covering r/AppleImmersiveVideo, r/VisionPro, r/VR180Film, and more.
